title: Software Developer Intern
description:
This role is for one of AccioJob’s hiring partners: Tennr




Job Title: Software Engineer Intern

Work Location: Gurgaon (Onsite)

CTC: ₹12 LPA to ₹16 LPA




Eligibility Criteria

Degrees: Open to all

Branches: Open to all

Graduation Years: Open to all




The Role

As a Software Engineer at Tennr, you will work on building and improving web-based applications. You will collaborate with engineering teams to develop scalable solutions, contribute to frontend development, and solve real-world technical challenges.




Key Responsibilities

Develop and maintain web applications

Build responsive user interfaces using HTML and CSS

Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code

Collaborate with cross-functional teams on feature development

Debug, test, and optimize application performance

Participate in technical discussions and problem-solving




What You’ll Bring

Strong understanding of HTML and CSS

Good grasp of web development fundamentals

Problem-solving and analytical thinking skills

Ability to write clean and structured code

Willingness to learn and work in a fast-paced environment




Evaluation Process

Round 1: Offline Assessment at AccioJob Noida Centre or AccioJob Pune Centre

(Candidates must bring their laptop and earphones)

Further rounds for shortlisted candidates:




Resume Evaluation

Technical Interview – Round 1

Technical Interview – Round 2

Technical Interview – Round 3

Show more

title: Marketing Intern
description:
📌 About the Role

A Media Account Manager Intern works at the intersection of client communication + digital marketing execution. At agencies like SRV Media, this role is usually hands-on and fast-paced.




🧠 Key Responsibilities

During a 3-month internship, you can expect to:

Client CoordinationCommunicate with clients to understand campaign goals
Share updates, reports, and performance insights
Campaign ManagementAssist in running ads on platforms like Facebook, Instagram, and Google Ads
Monitor performance metrics (CTR, CPC, conversions)
Reporting & AnalyticsCreate weekly/monthly reports
Use tools like Google Analytics
Strategy SupportHelp plan campaigns and audience targeting
Research competitors and trends




🛠 Skills You’ll Gain

Digital marketing fundamentals
Client handling & communication
Data analysis & reporting
Ad campaign optimization




🎯 Who It’s Good For

This internship is ideal if you:

Are a student or fresher in marketing, business, or media
Want a career in digital marketing / account management
Prefer a mix of communication + analytics

title: Visual Merchandising Intern
description:
We are looking for a creative and energetic Visual Merchandising Intern to support our retail team in maintaining high-impact store displays and enhancing the overall customer experience at Cult stores.




Key Responsibilities




Assist in implementing visual merchandising guidelines across store displays.
Support in window displays, product placements, and in-store branding.
Ensure store layouts and fixtures are aligned with brand standards.
Work closely with store managers and VM team for new store launches and campaigns.
Monitor display maintenance, signage, and seasonal promotions.
Assist in VM audits, store walkthroughs, and photo reporting.
Coordinate with operations for VM materials and store readiness.




Requirements




Graduate / pursuing degree in Fashion, Retail, Design, or Visual Merchandising.
Strong creative sense and eye for aesthetics.
Good communication and teamwork skills.
Passion for retail, sportswear, and fitness lifestyle brands.
Ability to travel within Pune stores if required.
Immediate joiners preferred.

title: Digital Marketing Intern
description:
Company Description

Liftup Technologies is a trusted partner in crafting exceptional digital experiences, specializing in empowering startups and businesses to succeed online. With over a decade of combined experience, the company offers a comprehensive range of services, including design, development, and targeted marketing strategies to enhance brand visibility and drive results. Liftup Technologies has collaborated with renowned brands such as Tata Tele, Interakt, Tata Motors Grihini, and Bimble, helping clients achieve significant growth. Based on a client-centric approach, the company values integrity, collaboration, and meaningful connections, enabling mutual success in the digital sphere.




Role Description

This is a full-time on-site Digital Marketing Intern role based in Pune Division. As a Digital Marketing Intern, you will contribute to planning, executing, and analyzing digital marketing campaigns. Your responsibilities include maintaining social media accounts, conducting market research, optimizing digital content, implementing effective online marketing strategies, and using web analytics to track performance. You will play a crucial role in engaging target audiences and helping elevate clients' digital presence.




Qualifications

Experience or interest in Social Media Marketing, Digital Marketing, and Online Marketing
Proficiency in Web Analytics and understanding of its applications
Strong Communication skills, both written and verbal
Ability to collaborate in a team-based environment
Enthusiasm for learning about the latest trends in digital marketing
Show more

title: Sales And Marketing Intern
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Assistant Intern to support a dynamic entrepreneur and content creator. This is a genuine internship opportunity with hands-on exposure to administrative operations, social media coordination, sales support, and marketing reporting.

The role requires strong communication skills, excellent coordination abilities, and the ability to manage multiple responsibilities in a fast-paced environment.







Key Responsibilities







Administrative Support

Manage daily calendar, appointments, meetings, and reminders
Handle emails, follow-ups, documentation, and routine administrative tasks
Coordinate with internal teams, external stakeholders, brands, and partners
Maintain confidentiality and professionalism in all communications

Travel, Events & Scheduling

Assist in planning and coordinating travel itineraries
Organize meetings, events, shoots, and brand collaborations
Ensure smooth execution of schedules, timelines, and deliverables

Social Media & Brand Coordination

Manage and maintain Instagram and work-related social media profiles
Coordinate with brands, agencies, and stakeholders for social media campaigns
Assist in planning, executing, and tracking social media collaborations
Ensure timely posting, approvals, and professional communication with partners

Sales & Marketing Support

Manage internal tools, including sales and marketing tools (CRM, trackers, dashboards, etc.)
Support sales outreach, follow-ups, and lead coordination
Maintain accurate records of leads, deals, and campaign performance
Create and share weekly sales reports with clear summaries and insights
Prepare sales, marketing, and performance reports

Tools & Reporting

Create reports, presentations, and trackers using MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Maintain organized data records and documentation

Required Skills & Qualifications

Strong verbal and written communication skills
Excellent organizational and time-management abilities
Proficiency in MS Office tools (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Basic understanding of social media platforms (Instagram & YouTube)
Familiarity with sales and marketing tools, or willingness to learn
Ability to multitask and handle confidential information responsibly
Proactive, detail-oriented, and solution-driven mindset

Preferred Qualifications

Interest or experience in social media management or influencer marketing
Basic knowledge of CRM tools and marketing automation platforms
Background in business administration, marketing, communications, or related fields

What You Will Gain

Internship & Experience Letter from Orange Genesis (Dutch Company)
Practical, hands-on experience in sales operations, marketing, and digital coordination
Exposure to real-world brand collaborations and business workflows
Skill development supporting long-term professional growth
Show more

title: Social Media Marketing Intern
description:
Location: Work from Office – Dhanori, Pune

Duration: 6 Months Internship




Witrex is looking for a creative and proactive Social Media Manager Intern who is passionate about content, trends, and building engaging digital communities.

This is a great opportunity to gain hands-on experience in managing social media for brands and learning how agency-driven marketing works.




Key Responsibilities

Assist in planning and executing social media strategies
Create and maintain monthly social media content calendars
Brainstorm creative ideas for reels, carousels, and social media campaigns
Support in creating captions, hooks, and storytelling content
Monitor trends, hashtags, and competitor activities
Track engagement metrics and assist in performance reporting
Collaborate with design and content teams for campaign execution




Requirements

Passion for social media, content creation, and digital marketing
Basic understanding of platforms like Instagram and LinkedIn
Creative thinking with trend awareness
Good communication and writing skills
Familiarity with Canva or basic design tools is a plus




What You’ll Gain

Hands-on experience working in a digital marketing agency
Exposure to real client campaigns and brand strategy
Opportunity to build a strong portfolio
Mentorship from experienced marketing professionals

title: Marketing Intern
description:
WUDMIN ENERGY is looking for a dynamic and creative Marketing Intern to join our team. We are a renewable services company focused on accelerating India’s decarbonization through renewable energy solutions.




Key Requirements:




- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).

- Background in Electrical or Electronics Engineering (Degree/Diploma), an MBA is preferred.

- Strong writing and presentation skills.

- Proficiency in Canva and AI platforms (e.g. ChatGPT, Gemini).

- Ability to create marketing collaterals, flyers, campaigns, carousels and presentations.




Internship Details:




- Duration: 3 Months (Contract-to-Hire)

- Schedule: 5 days a week (Work from Office)

- Stipend: ₹10,000 per month




This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands on experience in marketing. High performing interns may be considered for full-time conversion.




To learn more about our mission, please visit www.wudmin.com If you are interested, please submit your application to pankaj@wudmin.com

title: Marketing And Business Development Intern
description:
We're building something real at StratXG Global, a movement to make every student in India campus-to-corporate ready.




We need sharp, driven people to help us grow.

This isn't a sit-and-watch internship.




You'll be on the ground, reaching colleges, building relationships, and directly contributing to something that matters.




What You'll Do:

→ Reach out to college student cells, TNP departments and placement coordinators via email, LinkedIn and phone calls

→ Make structured outreach calls to colleges and pitch Campus to Corporate Ready

→ Build and maintain relationships with college leadership and coordinators

→ Follow up on warm leads across all channels

→ Track outreach progress and report weekly




Who We're Looking For:

→ Minimum 2 months of experience in business development, Marketing (Digital & Social) or outreach

→ Comfortable making outreach calls and handling conversations confidently

→ Strong communication skills (written + verbal)

→ Self-driven with zero need for hand-holding

→ Passion for education and student growth




What You'll Get:

✅ Performance-based incentive

✅ Official Internship Certificate

✅ Real business exposure from Day 1

✅ Letter of Recommendation (top performers)

✅ Direct mentorship from the founder




Duration: 4–8 Weeks

Mode: On-Site

Start: Immediate




If you want experience that actually means something apply now.

title: Graphic Design Intern
description:
Indux Technology Internship (Remote, Unpaid) — 3 Months

Innovate, Implement, Inspire

Empowering Innovation with AI, Automation & Full-Spectrum IT Solutions







About Indux Technology

Indux Technology, part of the Indux Group, is a global IT services company leading next-generation software development. We specialize in AI, automation, cloud, and tech solutions that transform businesses. Our creative team delivers stunning UI/UX, branding, animation, and multimedia services to help clients stand out in competitive markets.







Role Overview

We are seeking creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designing Interns to contribute to our multimedia and design projects. You will work on UI/UX elements, branding materials, animations, presentations, and digital graphics that elevate Indux Technology’s client solutions and marketing campaigns. This role is ideal for aspiring designers looking to build a strong portfolio and gain experience in a fast-paced tech environment.










Key Responsibilities

• Design UI/UX elements, wireframes, and interactive visuals.

• Create branding assets including logos, banners, social media posts, and email templates.

• Develop 2D/3D animations, explainer videos, and presentations.

• Collaborate with marketing and product teams to ensure design consistency.

• Assist with creating graphics for websites, landing pages, and advertising campaigns.

• Support multimedia projects with photo editing and motion graphics.










Who Can Apply?

• Students or recent graduates in Graphic Design, Visual Arts, Multimedia, or related fields.

• Proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects), Figma, Sketch, or similar.

• Strong creativity with attention to detail and aesthetics.

• Ability to take feedback and work collaboratively in a remote setup.

• Basic understanding of UI/UX principles is a plus.













Internship Details

• Duration: 3 Months

• Type: Remote

• Stipend: Unpaid










• Perks:

• Gain hands-on experience working on real client projects

• Learn from experienced designers and creative leads

• Flexible remote work environment

• Internship certificate and potential full-time opportunity













Why Join Indux Technology?

• Work with a cutting-edge technology company specializing in AI, cloud, and digital transformation.

• Build a portfolio with diverse design projects across industries.

• Collaborate with expert professionals in tech and marketing domains.

• Be part of a dynamic, innovative, and growth-oriented team.

Show more

title: Digital Marketing Intern
description:
Company: JBK Technologies Pvt Ltd.

Location: Hinjewadi – Phase I, Pune

Internship Duration: 3 Months

Working Days: Mon–Sat | Timings: 11:AM – 8:PM




Interested candidates can also mail their resumes at teena.s@jbktechnologies.com / hr@jbktechnologies.com




Role Overview:

We are looking for a Digital Marketing Intern (SEO) to support improving search visibility, website traffic, and lead generation across multiple industries, including B2B and US-based local businesses. You will work on real client projects and gain hands-on experience in SEO, content optimization, and AI-driven search strategies (AEO & LLM SEO).




Responsibilities:

Support off-page SEO and authority building through citations, brand mentions, and outreach
Assist with on-page SEO optimization (meta tags, headings, internal linking)
Conduct keyword research and support content planning
Assist in updating service pages and blog content
Improve content structure for readability and rankings
Perform competitor research to identify opportunities
Identify basic SEO issues (broken links, missing tags, indexing issues)
Support website performance tracking using analytics tools
Help optimize content for featured snippets and AEO
Assist in structuring content for AI-driven search (LLM SEO)
Support blog planning and new page creation
Basic social media support.




Qualification & Required Skill:

Basic understanding of SEO (on-page & off-page)
Awareness of AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) and AI-driven search
Familiarity with SEO tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Search Console, or similar.
Strong analytical, research, and communication skills
Basic knowledge of:

- Keyword research

- Backlinks

- Content optimization

Good to Have:

Understanding of featured snippets and search intent optimization
Interest or experience in local SEO (Google Business Profile, citations)
Basic knowledge of B2B or lead generation strategies
Familiarity with analytics tools (Google Analytics, Google Search Console)







What you will gain:

Hands-on experience working on real client projects
Exposure to multiple industries
Practical knowledge of modern SEO & AI search trends
Opportunity to transition into a full-time SEO role

title: Trainee, Project Management
description:
Company Description

At Konecranes, we believe that great customer experience is built on the people behind the Konecranes name. Everything we do, we do with passion and drive. We believe diversity drives business success and is the foundation for our growth. We welcome different backgrounds and skills that enrich our community and we promote a place where we can ALL be ourselves. This is what makes Konecranes a unique place to work.

Job Description

Job Summary:

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Project Management Fresher to join our team. As a Project Management Trainee, you will assist in planning, executing, and closing projects under the guidance of senior project managers. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in managing real-world projects across various domains.

Key Responsibilities:


Organizing Kick off meeting for all assigned new order with Internal stake Holders for smooth order transfer.
Preparation and control of schedules/project plans for all orders.
Conduct regular planning & review meetings to ensure project timelines.
Single window for all communication with Customer in regard to approvals, project schedules and delivery plans.
Organizing Inspections as required under QAP.
Coordination with site team for schedules and ensuring project timelines.
Project milestone update to customer.
Coordination with design team for the detail engineering.
Cost management/Budget control with the help of senior manager.
SAP Knowledge would be an extra advantage.
Coordination with commercial team on AR (account receivables).
Coordination with site team for project closure.
Maintain project documentation and ensure compliance with internal processes
Awareness of ISO 14001 & 45001 standards


Qualifications

Qualification: Diploma (DET) – Electrical.

Experience: Fresher or 0-1year experience.

Competencies and skills, we expect for this role:


Excellent written and verbal communication
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); familiarity with tools like SAP & MS Project is a plus.
Ability to work with team to achieve goals.
Target Driven
Eagerness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment


Additional Information

What we offer you:

In return, we can offer you exciting and challenging Specialist – Project Management and flexible working environment to form a part of the Konecranes & Demag Industrial Cranes India team, you will create value added support locally and in delivering services as per our Lifting People Strategy.

Additional information:

Please apply through www.konecranes.com/career

Konecranes moves what matters. We are a global leader in material handling solutions, serving a broad range of customers across multiple industries. We consistently set the industry benchmark, from everyday improvements to the breakthroughs at moments that matter most, because we know we can always find a safer, more productive and sustainable way. That's why, with 16 000+ professionals in over 50 countries, we are trusted every day to lift, handle and move what the world needs.

Konecranes is committed to ensuring that all employees and job applicants are treated fairly in an environment which is free from any form of discrimination.

title: Trainee Software Engineer (Frontend) - MedInsight (Dev)
description:
About Milliman

Milliman is among the world's largest providers of actuarial and related products and services. Our mission is to serve our clients to protect the health and financial well-being of people everywhere. Founded in 1947, Milliman is an independent firm with offices in major cities around the globe. We are owned and managed by our principals, senior consultants whose selection is based on their technical, professional, and business achievements. Milliman serves the full spectrum of business, financial, government, union, education, and nonprofit organizations. In addition to our consulting actuaries, Milliman's body of professionals includes numerous other specialists, ranging from clinicians to economists.

We are looking for an enthusiastic Trainee Software Engineer with a desire to grow their knowledge and experience as part of our team.

About Milliman’s MedInsight Team

Leading with our core values of Quality, Integrity, and Opportunity, MedInsight is the healthcare industry’s most trusted solution for healthcare intelligence. Our company’s purpose is to empower easy, data-driven decision-making on important healthcare questions. Through our products, education, and services, MedInsight is making an impact on healthcare by helping to drive better outcomes for patients while reducing waste. Over 300 leading healthcare organizations have come to rely on MedInsight analytic solutions for healthcare cost and care management.

Job Overview

We are seeking a motivated and enthusiastic Trainee Full Stack Engineer to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will have the opportunity to gain hands-on experience working with advanced software development technologies, tools, and frameworks including React., NET, Databricks and Azure. This position is ideal for individuals eager to expand their technical skills, contribute to innovative projects, and grow as professionals in a collaborative environment.

Roles And Responsibilities


Develop a comprehensive understanding of the organization, including its overarching mission, core values, and strategic goals, to ensure alignment in all tasks and responsibilities.
Exhibit a proactive learning attitude during the various training sessions provided, effectively applying the knowledge gained to the projects and products supported throughout the tenure.
Learn and understand the technologies, tools, and frameworks used by the development team to contribute effectively to projects.
Initially, you will work under general guidance, with the opportunity to gradually take on more responsibility and handle tasks independently.
Work effectively as part of a distributed global team, collaborating with colleagues across different time zones and locations.


Key Requirements


Freshers who wish to pick up career opportunities in IT are eligible to apply.
Having knowledge of Redux, Databricks, SQL will be an added advantage.
Must have knowledge of basic frontend technologies including HTML, CSS, OOPS Concepts (Structural language e.g. C#), .NET CORE, JavaScript, React.js and its core principles.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Highly motivated with an eagerness to learn and a sense of ownership and accountability.


Qualification: Any Graduate (B.E, B.Tech, MCA) with less or no experience.

Personal Characteristics

Demonstrate Competencies Including


Teamwork - Work cooperatively and treat clients and co-workers with respect and dignity while valuing individual differences, encouraging new ideas and sharing information.
Commitment to excellence - Demonstrate commitment to being creative, innovative, flexible and adaptable, focusing on quality solutions, continually improving and being a winner.
Attention to Detail – Demonstrate a keen eye for accuracy and thoroughness in all tasks and responsibilities.
Time Management – Effectively prioritize and manage tasks to meet deadlines and maximize productivity.


What We Offer


Hands-on experience working with advanced software development technologies, tools, and frameworks.
Mentorship & Guidance: Receive mentorship from experienced professionals to help you grow in your data engineering career.
Global Collaboration: Join a global team and gain experience working in a distributed environment.
Learning Opportunities: Access to various training and development programs to enhance your skills and knowledge in the field of Software/Web Engineering.
Show more

title: Business Development Trainee
description:
Join WWF-India as a Fundraiser and be our Conservation Ambassador at Airports!

Do you love talking to people and want your words to make a real difference? WWF-India is looking for passionate, confident, and outgoing individuals to engage with travelers at airports and inspire them to support our mission to save the nature and biodiversity of our country.

As the face of WWF-India, you will:


Interact with travelers at the airport and share stories of our conservation work across India.
Encourage and inspire them to contribute towards protecting wildlife and nature.
Be a proud representative of one of the world’s most respected conservation organizations.



Benefits

Work in 6-hour flexible shifts inside airports with full amenities.

â Opportunity to work with the WWF-India, gain knowledge on conservation issues, and develop life skills and confidence.

â Attractive salary plus performance-based incentives .

Job Location – Hyderabad Airport

If you’re energetic, people-oriented, and driven by a cause, this is your chance to turn Conversations into Conservation !

Apply now and be the change nature needs!

title: Trainee Regional Finance
description:
About this Position: Accomplishes tasks as directed by supervisor(s) and supports processes/operations of the respective Henkel team. Complies with Henkel's internal guidelines, rules and regulations.

What you´ll do:


Support the Finance team in monthly closing activities, financial analysis, and special projects, gaining hands-on experience in real-world business operations
Assist in preparing financial reports, business presentations, and performance dashboards for leadership review
Work closely with cross-functional teams to support operational processes, ensuring alignment with Henkel’s internal policies and global compliance standards
Contribute to the execution of strategic initiatives, helping identify areas for efficiency and improvement
Take ownership of assigned tasks, with guidance from experienced mentors and supervisors, in a collaborative and inclusive team environment


What makes you a good fit:


CA certified with minimum 01 year of work experience
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities, with a keen eye for detail and accuracy
A proactive, self-driven mindset with a genuine eagerness to learn, contribute, and grow in a fast-paced corporate environment
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint; familiarity with financial systems or ERP tools (e.g., SAP) is an added advantage
Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams and functions
Candidates must be based in Navi Mumbai and available for full-time, on-site engagement


Some perks of joining Henkel:


Diverse national and international growth opportunities
Global wellbeing standards with health and preventive care programs
Gender-neutral parental leave for a minimum of 8 weeks
Best-in-class Group Medical Insurance policy covering employee, spouse and up to 2 children
Competitive accident and term life policies for up to 3 times annual gross salary
Progressive OPD policy of INR 30,000 for employee, spouse and up to 2 children


At Henkel, we come from a broad range of backgrounds, perspectives, and life experiences. We believe the uniqueness of all our employees is the power in us. Become part of the team and bring your uniqueness to us! We look for a diverse team of individuals who possess different backgrounds, experiences, personalities and mindsets.

title: EBO Program management Intern
description:
About Cult - Curefit Healthcare Pvt Ltd, founded in 2016, is India’s largest fitness company and wellness platform. Cult, from the house of Curefit, was established with a mission to make fitness easy, fun and accessible to everyone, and has emerged as a community celebrating the joy of fitness. The brand today offers a range of fitness services ranging from group workouts, gyms and personalized fitness solutions, as well as an expansive selection of quality fitness products for the everyday athlete. The company’s vision is to empower everyone towards an active and healthier lifestyle through innovative fitness solutions, enabled by technology.




Program Management Intern

Description:

We are looking for a Program Management Intern to support the planning, coordination, and execution of key business initiatives while working closely with cross-functional teams. This role provides hands-on exposure to project tracking, stakeholder management, and data-driven decision-making in a fast-paced environment.

Assist in planning and executing ongoing programs and projects
Track timelines, milestones, and deliverables to ensure timely completion
Maintain project trackers and prepare regular reports and dashboards
Coordinate with cross-functional teams and follow up on action items
Identify risks, bottlenecks, and dependencies, and support mitigation
Support data analysis and generate insights for decision-making
Document processes, workflows, and key learnings

title: PR & Awards Intern
description:
PR & Awards Intern - Schbang

Location: Mumbai (In-office, WFH on Wednesdays)

Duration: 3 - 6 months




About the role :

This isn't a "make decks and take notes" internship. You'll be working directly with the

communications team on two things that actually matter — getting Schbang's work seen,

and getting it recognized.

PR and awards aren't glamorous. They're obsessive, detail-driven, deadline-heavy work. If

that excites you, read on.




What you'll do

● Research and identify PR opportunities — journalists, publications, podcasts,

industry conversations where Schbang's work and POV belongs

● Support outreach and relationship-building with media

● Research awards across advertising, marketing, technology, and culture — find the

right ones, track deadlines, understand what winning entries look like

● Help write and compile awards submissions — this means digging into campaign

briefs, results, and strategy, and turning them into a compelling narrative

● Coordinate with internal teams (our PODs) to gather what you need — campaign

context, data, creative assets — without being a bottleneck for them

● Keep a running tracker of what's submitted, what's pending, what's won




What we're looking for

Background doesn't matter. We don't care if you studied mass comm, engineering, literature,

or something completely unrelated.

What we do care about:

● You're genuinely curious about communications, PR, and what makes work get

recognized

● You write clearly and don't need three rounds of editing to get there

● You're the kind of person who finds their own way when they hit a wall — Googles,

calls, figures it out

● You're organized enough to manage multiple deadlines without someone chasing

you

● You want to learn fast, not just add a line to your resume

What you'll get

● Real work on a real brand — not simulation projects

● A front-row seat to how a leading creative and digital agency tells its story

● Exposure to India's advertising and marketing awards circuit from the inside
